calendar.matters:
RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Set For Trial On Sep-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Chandra O'Brien Miller, Esq. for Appellant/Defendant Teruko Watanabe, who is also present.
Stephen MacLean, Esq. for Respondent/Plaintiff, Andrey Pitin who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are affirmed.

Andrey Pitin, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - Luxor Cab Company Report.
Exhibit 2 - Patient Instruction Handout from Kaiser Permanente.
Exhibit 3 - Itemized List of treatments and charges.
Exhibit 4 - Document re Industrial Work Status.
Exhibit 5 - Letter from State Compensation Insurance Fund.
Exhibit 6 - Letter from Golden Bear Insurance Company.

Chandra O'Brien cross examines Andrey Pitin. The following documentary evidence is introduced on behalf of the Defendant.

Exhibit A - 6 pictures of car involved in collision.

Teruko Watanabe, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on her own behalf.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Katherine Feinstein, Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (501)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Continued To Sep-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
